headlines.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
headlines.summary: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.

headlines.title: Graham Platner denies sex assault claim as Democrats urge him to quit Maine Senate race
headlines.summary: Graham Platner hopes to unseat Republican Sen. Susan Collins, but the Democrat's campaign is reeling from a bombshell allegation by Jenny Racicot.

headlines.title: Belgium loses appeal of Balogun eligibility after Trump defends intervention with FIFA
headlines.summary: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U.S. striker play Belgium as officials objected.

headlines.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
headlines.summary: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.

headlines.title: China's Alibaba bans Anthropic AI for employees after 'distillation attack' accusation
headlines.summary: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba has put Anthropic's Claude Code on a high-risk software list.

headlines.title: Here's how SpaceX's Nasdaq-100 inclusion might affect options pricing
headlines.summary: About half-a-million SpaceX options traded by midday Monday, a little below the average since inception.

headlines.title: Rivian, Tesla and the 'Holly Index': How to trade the new EV Main Street battle
headlines.summary: Mike Khouw gives a trade on Rivian and Tesla, informed by his wife's recent auto purchase.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for boosting portfolio returns

headlines.title: Tech bulls lose conviction as key trading metric blows out to the widest since 2008
headlines.summary: The pick-up in demand for puts aligns with slowing momentum in AI stocks that had been consistently rewarding speculators to the upside.

headlines.title: Most prediction market contracts have low volume, leaving users exposed to volatility and bots
headlines.summary: Prediction market volume has grown exponentially but several markets never make it over $10,000.

headlines.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
headlines.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."

headlines.title: The Nasdaq-100 has been far more volatile than the S&P 500. Now add SpaceX to the mix.
headlines.summary: While SpaceX is due to join the Nasdaq-100 on Tuesday, it won’t become part of the S&P 500 for at least another year — likely furthering the volatility spread between those two indexes.

headlines.title: U.S.-Belgium match could draw record TV audience amid the Trump World Cup controversy
headlines.summary: Some industry experts are predicting all-time viewing records for a U.S. soccer game

headlines.title: Your data built the AI boom — but Big Tech is pocketing 100% of the equity
headlines.summary: Your share of the AI wealth is a right — not a handout. Here is how we claw back our money.

headlines.title: Your investing expectations are more than double the reality. Here is the tough truth.
headlines.summary: Long-term real returns above 10% annualized are exceedingly rare.

headlines.title: Stocks rally when Congress goes on summer break. Here’s why.
headlines.summary: Stock prices face greater volatility when lawmakers are active, driven entirely by the regulatory uncertainty they create.

headlines.title: You want a portfolio that matches your morals. Your retirement plan might disagree.
headlines.summary: More investors want their money to reflect their values. It feels righteous — but the reality is a lot messier.
